name: ref-07-result-success
text:
You're set.

Auto Play is ready.

Every movie night, we'll press
Play on your Roku for you.

Done

name: ref-08-result-failed
text:
Didn't work this time.

Connection couldn't reach your Roku.
Check that the IP is correct and both
devices are on the same Wi-Fi.

Retry
Try a different device

Start movie night anyway
We'll pick this up next session.

text:

Auto Play yet.

Auto Play works great with Roku,
LG, Samsung, or VIZIO.

Check another device
Continue without Auto Play
